# זכייה בטוחה — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A comprehensive information and guidance website for winners of subsidized housing projects in Israel. The site focuses on two critical phases: choosing the right apartment and navigating the mortgage process. The brand serves as a trusted advisor helping people successfully complete their journey from winning a subsidized housing lottery to becoming homeowners.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://-d96810e6.zappy5.app
זכיתם בדירה בהנחה? קבלו מדריך מקיף לבחירת הדירה הנכונה ולקבלת משכנתא אטרקטיבית. ליווי מקצועי לזוכי פרויקטים עד קבלת המפתח.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About זכייה בטוחה
A comprehensive information and guidance website for winners of subsidized housing projects in Israel. The site focuses on two critical phases: choosing the right apartment and navigating the mortgage process. The brand serves as a trusted advisor helping people successfully complete their journey from winning a subsidized housing lottery to becoming homeowners.

## Target Audience
זוכי פרויקט דירה בהנחה

## Industry
נדל"ן ומשכנתאות

---
